ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: R-42 long barrel
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: An extended electromagnetic acceleration barrel for the R-42 DeadEye. Its longer acceleration path drives the slug to greater velocity, improving effective range, terminal force, armor penetration, and long-range consistency at the cost of weight and handling.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: R-42 short barrel
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: A compact electromagnetic acceleration barrel that reduces forward weight and brings the R-42 on target faster. The shortened acceleration path sacrifices range, muzzle velocity, penetration, and long-range stability.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: R-42 long rail
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: A full-length dual rail assembly that supplies stronger electromagnetic thrust and maintains a more stable acceleration field. It supports extreme-range fire at the cost of additional mass and a slower firing solution.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: R-42 assault rail
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: A compact magnetic constraint assembly that reduces forward inertia for faster target acquisition. It remains effective at close and medium range, but gives up some projectile velocity, penetration, and long-range stability.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: advanced red dot sight
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: An unobstructed projected aiming point backed by AI fire control that automatically identifies hostile targets. It accelerates target acquisition and correction at close to medium range without providing environmental penetration.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: red dot sight
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: An exceptionally light red dot sight with a wide, clear sight picture. It is optimized for immediate close-range engagement, trading away medium- and long-range precision.

ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.label: R-42 charged barrel
ProtossMech.GunSmith.GunSmithPartDef.description: An APEX charging barrel that stores energy before firing, driving the projectile to extreme muzzle velocity. Air trapped in the bore is heated into plasma and expelled with the slug, producing a secondary plasma detonation after the kinetic impact. When complete, this system will transform the R-42 from an anti-materiel rifle into a plasma-rail sniper cannon.
